name: team subject year and week splits with per-week team column
description: Team subject + year+week split + per-week team column
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "team" as (SELECT team_code FROM (VALUES ('ARI'),('ATL'),('BAL'),('BUF'),('CAR'),('CHI'),('CIN'),('CLE'),('DAL'),('DEN'),('DET'),('GB'),('HOU'),('IND'),('JAX'),('KC'),('LA'),('LAC'),('LV'),('MIA'),('MIN'),('NE'),('NO'),('NYG'),('NYJ'),('PHI'),('PIT'),('SEA'),('SF'),('TB'),('TEN'),('WAS')) AS t(team_code)), "team_years" as (SELECT team.team_code, base_years.year FROM team CROSS JOIN base_years), "team_years_weeks" as (SELECT team_years.team_code, nfl_year_week_timestamp.year, nfl_year_week_timestamp.week FROM team_years INNER JOIN nfl_year_week_timestamp ON team_years.year = nfl_year_week_timestamp.year WHERE nfl_year_week_timestamp.year = 2023), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" as materialized (select "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays, "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."year", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."week" from "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."year", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."week") select "team_years_weeks"."team_code", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "team_years_weeks"."year", "team_years_weeks"."week" from "team_years_weeks" left join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" on "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "team_years_weeks"."team_code" and t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats.week = team_years_weeks.week and t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats.year = team_years_weeks.year group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "team_years_weeks"."year", "team_years_weeks"."week", "team_years_weeks"."team_code" order by "team_years_weeks"."team_code" asc limit 500
